sourcesContent:
import React from "react";
import HeaderInfo from "./components/HeaderInfo";
import HeaderNavigator from "./components/HeaderNavigator";

import "./Header.css";

function Header({ currentPageName }) {
  return (
    <header>
      <HeaderInfo
        currentPageName={currentPageName}
        githubURL="www.github.com"
        githubPagesURL="www.github.com"
        domainName="www.unix69.github.io"
        headerInfoClass="header-info"
        headerTitleInfoClass="header-title-info"
        headerTitleInfoBackgroundImageClass="header-title-info-background-image"
        headerTitleInfoDomainInfoClass="header-title-info-domain-info"
        headerTitleInfoDomainUrlClass="header-title-info-domain-url"
        headerTitleInfoDomainLogoClass="header-title-info-domain-logo"
        headerMainInfoClass="header-main-info"
        headerMainInfoCurrentPageClass="header-main-info-current-page"
        headerMainInfoSpaceClass="header-main-info-space"
        headerMainInfoContactInfoClass="header-main-info-contact-info"
        headerMainInfoContactLabelClass="header-main-info-contact-label"
        headerMainInfoGitHubInfoClass="header-main-info-github-info"
        headerMainInfoTelegramInfoClass="header-main-info-telegram-info"
        headerMainInfoGmailInfoClass="header-main-info-gmail-info"
        headerMainInfoGitHubUrlClass="header-main-info-github-url"
        headerMainInfoGitHubLogoClass="header-main-info-github-logo"
        headerMainInfoTelegramLogoClass="header-main-info-telegram-logo"
        headerMainInfoGmailLogoClass="header-main-info-gmail-logo"
        headerSubInfoClass="header-sub-info"
      />

      <HeaderNavigator
        headerNavigatorClass="header-navigator"
        headerNavigatorItemClass="header-navigator-item"
        headerNavigatorLinkClass="header-navigator-link"
        headerNavigatorDropdownClass="header-navigator-dropdown"
      />
    </header>
  );
}

export default Header;
